---
title: "Home"
---

I'm Anastasia Soukhov, a PhD in Geography from McMaster University (Canada) with degrees in transportation and civil engineering.

This is a little home for comments on my research. Currently, I'm a Postdoctoral Associate at Western University in London Ontario, Canada working with the [**H**uman **E**nvironments **A**nalysis **L**aboratory](https://theheal.ca/about/). My research focuses on:

-   Accessibility and spatial interaction modeling

-   Built environment and transportation

-   Social inequities, inequality and sustainability

-   Open science

Learn more [**About Me**](about.qmd), my [**Publications**](#0)**,** and [**Research Highlights**](#0).
